description: Strategic evaluation: Should we run 2 EN accounts instead of EN + JP? Analyze using latest scout data (data/scout_report_20260308.json or most recent), core strategy (data/core_strategy.json), and market comparison data. Compare EN vs JP across: (1) market size & follower ceiling, (2) competition density, (3) engagement rates, (4) growth velocity potential, (5) monetization opportunities, (6) operational complexity of 2 EN vs EN+JP, (7) risk diversification. Produce a comprehensive evaluation report as JSON at data/market_evaluation_20260308.json with clear recommendation (Option A: keep EN+JP, Option B: switch to 2 EN accounts, Option C: any alternative). Include pros/cons for each option. Then generate HTML report and send via Telegram.
notes: Operator noticed EN has more opportunity than JP from the pipeline reports. Key context: JP has had API 402 errors for some competitors, EN top performers show massive growth potential (691K followers from 13 tweets). Need honest data-driven recommendation, not just validation of operator's hunch. Consider JP market uniqueness — less competition could mean easier early growth even if ceiling is lower.
